mapper.select:
SELECT sr.survey_response_id AS surveyResponseId, sr.survey_instance_id AS surveyInstanceId,
si.survey_template_id AS surveyTemplateId, si.onboarding_id AS onboardingId, si.status AS instanceStatus, si.scheduled_at AS scheduledAt, si.sent_at AS sentAt, si.closed_at AS closedAt,
st.name AS templateName, st.stage AS stage,
oi.employee_id AS employeeId,
ep.user_id AS employeeUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ep.employee_name, ''), eu.full_name) AS employeeName, COALESCE(NULLIF(ep.employee_email, ''), eu.email) AS employeeEmail, ep.job_title AS jobTitle,
d.name AS departmentName,
COALESCE(oi.manager_user_id, ep.manager_user_id) AS managerUserId, mu.full_name AS managerName,
sr.overall_score AS overallScore, sr.submitted_at AS submittedAt
FROM survey_responses sr
INNER JOIN survey_instances si ON si.survey_instance_id = sr.survey_instance_id AND si.company_id = sr.company_id
INNER JOIN survey_templates st ON st.survey_template_id = si.survey_template_id AND st.company_id = sr.company_id
LEFT JOIN onboarding_instances oi ON oi.onboarding_id = si.onboarding_id AND oi.company_id = sr.company_id
LEFT JOIN employee_profiles ep ON ep.employee_id = oi.employee_id AND ep.company_id = sr.company_id
LEFT JOIN users eu ON eu.user_id = ep.user_id AND eu.company_id = sr.company_id
LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.department_id = ep.department_id AND d.company_id = sr.company_id
LEFT JOIN users mu ON mu.user_id = COALESCE(oi.manager_user_id, ep.manager_user_id) AND mu.company_id = sr.company_id
WHERE sr.company_id = #{companyId}
AND si.survey_template_id = #{templateId}
AND UPPER(st.stage) = UPPER(#{stage})
AND sr.submitted_at >= #{startDate}
AND sr.submitted_at <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY sr.submitted_at DESC

SELECT survey_response_id AS surveyResponseId, survey_instance_id AS surveyInstanceId, responder_user_id AS responderUserId, submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM survey_responses WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND survey_instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC LIMIT 1
